title: Validate collection wrappers with TryFrom
scenario: An order without lines is invalid. TryFrom<Vec<OrderLine>> can enforce that invariant at the wrapper boundary.
instructions: Implement TryFrom<Vec<OrderLine>> for OrderLines and return OrderLinesError::Empty when the vector has no lines.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps wrap-nonempty-tryfrom explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
